name: 1/2 Kneeling Hip Flexor Stretch
coaching_cues: Tuck pelvis gently; Squeeze back-side glute; Reach tall through crown
common_mistakes: Arching low back; Dumping into front hip

name: Cross Body Knee Hug
coaching_cues: Pull knee across body; Keep opposite shoulder grounded; Breathe into the stretch

name: 90/90 Supported Hip CAR
coaching_cues: Move from hip socket; Keep torso tall; Use hands for light support

name: Dumbbell Side Lying ER Shoulder
coaching_cues: Keep elbow pinned; Rotate slowly; Stop before shoulder rolls back

name: Glute Bridge March
coaching_cues: Hold ribs down; Keep hips level; Drive through heel

name: Isometric Bird Dog
coaching_cues: Reach long; Brace gently; Keep hips square

name: Side Lying Hip Raise
coaching_cues: Stack shoulders and hips; Lift from bottom oblique; Keep neck relaxed
common_mistakes: Pushing through top hand; Letting hips roll

name: Dumbbell Single Leg Glute Bridge
coaching_cues: Keep pelvis level; Drive through planted heel; Pause at top

name: Dumbbell Single Arm Floor Press
coaching_cues: Pack shoulder; Press straight up; Keep opposite ribs down
